REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1000 Kirkham Street, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Feb-17-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anne Marie Paolini-Mori for (petitioner) Roberto Cuneo.

The sale for 100% interest was confirmed at $2,244,100.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed 1/20/16. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond has been waived.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
